title: Radiotherapy Mission and Vision
content:
Radiotherapy Mission and Vision

MISSION

As Radiotherapy program, our mission is to train technicians who have reached the international level of knowledge by adhering to the rules required by professional knowledge with a qualified, competent, innovative, future-oriented education and training approach, who have ethical and moral values, who are preferred in the public and private sectors.

VISION

Our vision as a radiotherapy program is to be an education and training program that understands human beings, values the environment and nature, to be open to student-oriented communication and reconciliation, follows and adapts to technological developments in order to train highly qualified people and produce knowledge.
